inputs.label: Net Credit Sales
inputs.businessContext: Total credit sales minus returns and allowances.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total credit sales minus returns and allowances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İadeler ve indirimler hariç toplam kredi satışları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Kreditverkäufe abzüglich Retouren und Gutschriften.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des ventes à crédit moins les retours et les remises.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ventas totales a crédito menos devoluciones y descuentos.

inputs.label: Beginning Accounts Receivable
inputs.businessContext: Accounts receivable at start of period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounts receivable at start of period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Comptes clients en début de période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuentas por cobrar al inicio del período.

inputs.label: Ending Accounts Receivable
inputs.businessContext: Accounts receivable at end of period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounts receivable at end of period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Comptes clients en fin de période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuentas por cobrar al final del período.

inputs.label: Days in Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the accounting period (e.g., 365 for year).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days in the accounting period (e.g., 365 for year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muhasebe dönemindeki gün sayısı (örneğin, yıl için 365).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage im Abrechnungszeitraum (z. B. 365 für ein Jahr).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours dans la période comptable (ex. 365 pour une année).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días del período contable (ej., 365 para un año).
